testcase.name: test_register_success_with_valid_pin

failure.message: Failed: Unexpected response: 400 - {"detail":"Mobile number must be 10 digits"}

testcase.name: test_register_rejects_non_6_digit_pin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_registration_login.py:59: in test_register_rejects_non_6_digit_pin "email": f"TEST_short_pin_{uuid.uuid4()[:6]}@test.com", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'UUID' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_register_rejects_weak_pin_all_same
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_registration_login.py:74: in test_register_rejects_weak_pin_all_same "email": f"TEST_weak_pin_{uuid.uuid4()[:6]}@test.com", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'UUID' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_register_rejects_invalid_mobile_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_registration_login.py:89: in test_register_rejects_invalid_mobile_format "email": f"TEST_invalid_mobile_{uuid.uuid4()[:6]}@test.com", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'UUID' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_register_rejects_missing_pin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_registration_login.py:132: in test_register_rejects_missing_pin "email": f"TEST_no_pin_{uuid.uuid4()[:6]}@test.com", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'UUID' object is not subscriptable

testcase.name: test_login_rejects_nonexistent_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_registration_login.py:337: in test_login_rejects_nonexistent_user "identifier": f"nonexistent_{uuid.uuid4()[:6]}@test.com", ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'UUID' object is not subscriptable
